headline: Bank of America Q2 Earnings Beat on NII, Trading & IB Strength
summary: BAC tops Q2 earnings estimates as higher NII, trading and investment banking strength drive y/y revenue growth despite rising expenses.

raw.headline: Bank of America Q2 Earnings Beat on NII, Trading & IB Strength
raw.summary: BAC tops Q2 earnings estimates as higher NII, trading and investment banking strength drive y/y revenue growth despite rising expenses.

headline: Higher Fee Income, Loan Growth Likely to Support BNY's Q2 Earnings
summary: BNY's investment services fee and net interest income are expected to have risen year over year in second-quarter 2026.

raw.headline: Higher Fee Income, Loan Growth Likely to Support BNY's Q2 Earnings
raw.summary: BNY's investment services fee and net interest income are expected to have risen year over year in second-quarter 2026.

headline: State Street’s Zahid Mustafa Joins Global Onchain Summit Singapore 2026 Speaker Lineup
summary: The Global Onchain Summit Singapore 2026 has confirmed another senior leader from the institutional finance world for its speaker lineup. This time, it is Zahid Mustafa, Managing Director and Head of Digital Custody and Cash, Product Development at State Street.
